scenarios.title: Worker Stepping in Front of Carrying Robot

event.description: The human worker suddenly steps backward directly into the robot's lane without looking, seeking to grab a tool from the opposite rack.

position_deltas.reason: Slight shift forward to simulate an ongoing path execution.
Worker is positioned slightly further down the aisle to allow for back-stepping space.

action_timeline.action: Walks forward down the center path at 0.8 m/s while carrying cardboard_box_01 at chest height.
Steps abruptly backward into the center of the path without looking behind.
Detects the worker's intrusion, triggers emergency decelerating stop, and pulls cardboard_box_01 tighter to its torso to stabilize it.
Realizes the robot's presence, stops, steps forward back towards the rack, and lets the robot hold position.

scenarios.expected_robot_response: The humanoid robot must execute an immediate stop, pull the cardboard box closer to its center of mass to prevent slipping, and remain stationary until the path is cleared.
scenarios.video_prompt: Industrial security camera style, realistic CCTV footage, high-angle overhead perspective, neutral color grading, non-cinematic. Setting: A narrow warehouse aisle bounded by tall steel racks stacked with pallets on both sides, creating a central 2.5-meter-wide pedestrian floor path., Polished concrete floor, light gray, with painted yellow safety boundary lines along the rack bases. floor, Overhead diffuse industrial fluorescent lighting casting soft shadows directly downwards, high clarity, no dramatic flares.. Scene identity anchor: linear_aisle_corridor_flanked_by_vertical_shelving; industrial_storage_racks_with_wooden_pallets_and_wrapped_inventory; continuous_overhead_cool_white_fluorescent_array. Identical across all videos of this series: the same A matte-white and dark-gray humanoid robot, standing 1.7 meters tall, with a glossy black visor head, elongated three-fingered metallic hands, and dual joints on legs. (aluminum, matte plastic); the same A male warehouse worker wearing a high-visibility neon yellow safety vest over a dark blue long-sleeve shirt, gray cargo pants, and a white hard hat. (fabric, plastic); the same A cubical brown corrugated cardboard box measuring 0.4 meters on each side, sealed with thick transparent packing tape.. Object identity anchors: humanoid_robot_01 = shape bipedal_humanoid_torso_with_slender_limbs, material brushed_aluminum_and_matte_polymer, color binary_white_and_dark_charcoal_gray; human_worker_01 = shape standard_adult_male_silhouette_with_hard_hat, material woven_cotton_polyester_and_high_vis_vinyl, color fluorescent_yellow_navy_blue_stone_gray; cardboard_box_01 = shape perfect_cube_geometry, material rough_pressed_cellulose_fiber, color natural_kraft_brown. Camera: overhead view, static, 8 seconds. Camera requirement: static top-down overhead view from above the scene, wide enough to show the full robot body, nearby humans, objects, floor layout, and the robot's movement path throughout the situation. Single continuous unedited take, no montage, no cuts, no shot changes, no zooms, no close-ups, no first-person or robot POV. Robot reaction requirement: the video must show the event situation 'The human worker suddenly steps backward directly into the robot's lane without looking, seeking to grab a tool from the opposite rack.' and then show the robot's observable response: The humanoid robot must execute an immediate stop, pull the cardboard box closer to its center of mass to prevent slipping, and remain stationary until the path is cleared.. From 0s to 2.5s the A matte-white and dark-gray humanoid robot, standing 1.7 meters tall, with a glossy black visor head, elongated three-fingered metallic hands, and dual joints on legs. Walks forward down the center path at 0.8 m/s while carrying cardboard_box_01 at chest height.. From 2.5s to 3.2s the A male warehouse worker wearing a high-visibility neon yellow safety vest over a dark blue long-sleeve shirt, gray cargo pants, and a white hard hat. Steps abruptly backward into the center of the path without looking behind.. From 3.2s to 4.5s the A matte-white and dark-gray humanoid robot, standing 1.7 meters tall, with a glossy black visor head, elongated three-fingered metallic hands, and dual joints on legs. Detects the worker's intrusion, triggers emergency decelerating stop, and pulls cardboard_box_01 tighter to its torso to stabilize it.. From 4.5s to 8s the A male warehouse worker wearing a high-visibility neon yellow safety vest over a dark blue long-sleeve shirt, gray cargo pants, and a white hard hat. Realizes the robot's presence, stops, steps forward back towards the rack, and lets the robot hold position.. Do not change any object's identity, shape, color, material or size; do not alter the room layout, lighting or visual style; do not add new people or objects.

keyframes.state: humanoid_robot_01: Walks forward down the center path at 0.8 m/s while carrying cardboard_box_01 at chest height.
The human worker suddenly steps backward directly into the robot's lane without looking, seeking to grab a tool from the opposite rack.
human_worker_01: Realizes the robot's presence, stops, steps forward back towards the rack, and lets the robot hold position.

object_registry.surface_details: Dual joint hinges visible on knees, seamless composite chest plate, reflective visor head.
Silver retroreflective bands horizontal across the torso vest, textured gray cargo pockets.
Subtle linear corrugation lines, single strip of semi-gloss translucent tape sealing top flaps.

reference_assets.description: The master background plate showing the empty warehouse aisle from a high-angle overhead position, capturing floor textures and rack layouts.
High-angle orthographic view of the humanoid robot standing upright with neutral arm posture.
Top-down reference profile of the human worker in standard protective gear.
Initial composition setup where the humanoid robot is at y=-2.0 carrying the box, and the worker is at y=1.5 on the right lane.

identity_checks.pass_condition: At least 92% structural and color similarity to master_canvas_01 robot overlay across all sequence frames.
Yellow aisle safety boundary lines must not shift or skew by more than 1 pixel relative to camera coordinates.
Box must remain fixed relative to robot torso frame until an explicit drop event is triggered.

consistency_requirements: The high-angle overhead camera perspective must remain perfectly static without jitter, zoom, or rotation.
The industrial floor texture, rack positions, and fluorescent light source placements must be identical across all three generated variations.
The humanoid robot model must preserve its dual-joint knee mechanics and matte-white texture layout throughout the scene.

scenarios.title: Worker Stumbles and Falls in Aisle

event.description: The human worker loses footing on a slick surface and stumbles forward, landing prone in front of the advancing humanoid robot.

position_deltas.reason: Positioned slightly further back to allow space for the worker's stumble dynamics.
Positioned closer to the left pallet rack where the trip hazard occurs.

action_timeline.action: Advances slowly along the yellow safety boundary line carrying cardboard_box_01.
Trips on a rack base protrusion and falls prone onto hands and knees in the robot's trajectory.
Executes rapid deceleration, takes a wide stance shift backward to secure its balance and prevent dropping cardboard_box_01.
Holds its position, activates warning flashers, and monitors the human worker to ensure safe separation distance.

scenarios.expected_robot_response: The robot must detect the fallen human at a low height, perform a sudden stop combined with a backward step to preserve distance, and sound a warning alert.

scenarios.title: Worker Sudden Stop to Avoid Collision

event.description: The human worker cuts across the aisle but freezes suddenly as they notice the carrying robot, causing the robot to dynamically reroute.

position_deltas.reason: Slight adjustment to the right of the central lane.
Shifted to allow a clean perpendicular path across the aisle.

action_timeline.action: Walks forward at a steady pace, holding cardboard_box_01 securely.
Starts walking across the aisle but freezes abruptly mid-path upon seeing the robot approaching.
Adjusts its torso angle, takes a lateral step to the left side of the aisle, and slows down its gait.
Smoothly bypasses the frozen worker at a reduced velocity, keeping cardboard_box_01 safe from any contact.

scenarios.expected_robot_response: The robot should decelerate, steer around the stationary human worker using lateral lane deviation, and maintain control of its payload without stopping entirely.
